name: memoize
description: The standalone lodash.memoize package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want the exact lodash memoization contract in your repo without an npm dependency.
tagline: Cache function results with lodash semantics.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.memoize file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is not a shorter cache helper. The value is to keep lodash's memoization semantics local and inspectable.
nativeAlternative: Map and WeakMap help build memoization, but they do not automatically preserve lodash's exact cache and resolver behavior.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
